deductions.title: Investments & Expenses
deductions.description: Deduction for investments in PPF, ELSS, NSC, life insurance premium, tuition fees, home loan principal repayment, etc.

deductions.title: Pension Fund Contribution
deductions.description: Deduction for contribution to pension funds. Combined limit with 80C.

deductions.title: NPS Employee Contribution
deductions.description: Employee contribution to National Pension System. Part of 80C combined limit. Max 10% of salary.

deductions.title: Additional NPS Contribution
deductions.description: Additional deduction of ₹50,000 for NPS contribution, over and above 80C limit.

deductions.title: Employer NPS Contribution
deductions.max_limit_note: 14% of salary (Central Govt) or 10% of salary (Others)
deductions.description: Employer's contribution to NPS. No upper cap, but limited to percentage of salary. Available in both regimes.

deductions.title: Medical Insurance Premium
deductions.description: Premium for medical insurance for self, family, and parents.

deductions.title: Disabled Dependent
deductions.description: Maintenance of disabled dependent. ₹75,000 for 40-80% disability, ₹1,25,000 for severe disability (80%+).

deductions.title: Education Loan Interest
deductions.description: Interest paid on education loan for higher education. Available for 8 years from start of repayment.

deductions.title: Donations to Charitable Institutions
deductions.max_limit_note: 50% or 100% of donation, subject to limits
deductions.description: Donations to approved charitable institutions and funds.
documents_required: Donation receipt with PAN of institution

deductions.title: Rent Paid (No HRA)
deductions.max_limit_note: ₹5,000/month or 25% of total income (whichever is less)
deductions.description: For individuals not receiving HRA. Least of: ₹5000/month, 25% of total income, or rent paid minus 10% of total income.

deductions.title: Savings Account Interest
deductions.description: Interest earned on savings bank account. For individuals below 60 years.

deductions.title: Interest Income for Senior Citizens
deductions.description: Interest from deposits for senior citizens (60+). Replaces 80TTA for seniors.

deductions.title: House Rent Allowance
deductions.description: Exemption for HRA received. Least of: actual HRA, 50%/40% of salary, or rent paid minus 10% of salary.

deductions.title: Home Loan Interest
deductions.description: Interest on home loan for self-occupied property. ₹2,00,000 limit for self-occupied, no limit for let-out property.

deductions.title: Leave Travel Allowance
deductions.description: Exemption for travel within India. Available twice in a block of 4 years.

deduction_tips: Maximize Section 80C first — it offers the highest single deduction of ₹1.5 lakhs
If you're paying rent and don't receive HRA, claim 80GG deduction
NPS offers additional ₹50,000 deduction under 80CCD(1B) beyond 80C limit
Health insurance for parents (especially senior citizens) can save up to ₹50,000 extra
Education loan interest has no upper limit — claim the full amount
Home loan interest up to ₹2 lakhs is deductible under Section 24(b)
Donations under 80G can reduce taxes while supporting causes you care about
